title: Carry On + Valkyrien Skies Compat
description: Patches Carry On so you can pick up blocks from Valkyrien Skies ships
body:
This mod simply patches [Carry On] to make it possible to pick up blocks like chests and other containers from assembled [Valkyrien Skies] ships. Now you can not only place your storage onto boats and vehicles, but also retrieve them again after you've sailed the seas, driven to the next town, or raced through the skies!

[Carry On]: https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on
[Valkyrien Skies]: https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies
